data.title: Nasdaq warns Celularity for not filing its Form 10-Q by deadline, violating listing rule 5250 (c)(1).
data.description: Celularity Inc., a regenerative and cellular medicine company traded on Nasdaq under the symbol CELU, recently disclosed that on August 21, 2025, it was notified by Nasdaq for not submitting its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the period ending June 30, 2025 on time. This notification indicates that the company is currently in violation of Listing Rule 5250 (c)(1) which mandates timely filing of all necessary periodic financial reports with the Securities and Exchange Commission.

data.title: FCPT acquires Bojangles property for $2.2 million in Tennessee with six years left on lease.
data.description: Mill Valley, CA - Four Corners Property Trust (NYSE:FCPT), a real estate investment trust focusing on high-quality, net-leased restaurant and retail properties, has recently acquired a Bojangles property for $2.2 million. Situated in a robust retail area in Tennessee, the property is run by the corporation under a triple net lease with about six years remaining on the lease term. FCPT is delighted to add this property to its portfolio, further solidifying its presence in the commercial real estate market.

data.title: ETH reaches new all-time high in nearly 4 years following Fed's hints at interest rate cuts.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Ethereum reached a record high, surpassing its previous peak for 2021 following indications from Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell about a potential interest rate reduction.

data.title: Skypoint AI ranks #34 in AI & Data category on 2025 Inc. 5000 List, prestigious ranking of fastest-growing private companies in America.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, in Portland, Oregon, Inc., a prominent media brand catering to entrepreneurs and business leaders, revealed that Skypoint AI has secured a spot on the esteemed Inc. 5000 list. This list recognizes the fastest-growing private companies in America.

data.title: Spire Global faces NYSE notice due to late filing of Form 10-Q for quarter ended June 30, 2025. Market implications.
data.description: Vienna-based Spire Global, Inc. (NYSE: SPIR), a leading global provider of space-based data and analytics, faced a setback on August 20, 2025. The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) informed the company of non-compliance with its listing standards outlined in Section 802.01E of the NYSE Listed Company Manual. This was due to Spire's delay in submitting its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the quarter ending June 30, 2025. This notification raised concerns about Spire's standing as a listed entity on the NYSE.

data.title: Iovance Biotherapeutics gave stock options to 20 new employees, totaling 182,370 shares, on August 21, 2025.
data.description: On August 21, 2025, Iovance Biotherapeutics, Inc., a biotech firm specializing in pioneering polyclonal tumor infiltrating lymphocyte (TIL) therapies for cancer patients, disclosed the approval of granting inducement stock options. The options cover a total of 182,370 shares of Iovance's common stock and are allocated to 20 incoming non-executive staff members. The company is headquartered in San Carlos, California, and trades on NASDAQ under the symbol IOVA.

data.title: Heisman Trophy and AXIA TIME at Ohio State team store on Aug. 29, 2-4 PM. WARREN, N.J., Aug. 22, 2025.
data.description: On August 29th from 2 to 4 PM, fans will have the opportunity to take photos with a bronze statue at the Ohio State team store on North High Street. This event will feature Ohio State timepieces by AXIA TIME. The event takes place in Warren, N.J., as announced on August 22, 2025, through PRNewswire. The Heisman Trophy and its designated timepiece by AXIA TIME will be showcased together during the event.

data.title: Ether surges to over $4,870, reaching a new all-time high amid Fed's dovish stance. Analysts predict Ether to surpass $5,000 soon.
data.description: Recently, the price of ETH surpassed its previous record high from November 2021. Analysts predict that a supportive stance by the Federal Reserve and increased institutional adoption will propel the value of Ether to exceed $5,000 in the near future.

data.title: ABRDN Japan Equity Fund (JEQ) provides details on tender offer & reorganization with ABRDN Global Infrastructure Income Fund (ASGI) in Philadephia on Aug. 22, 2025.
data.description: Philadelphia, August 22, 2025 - abrdn Japan Equity Fund, Inc. disclosed new information regarding the Fund's tender offer and expected closing details linked to its upcoming merger with abrdn Global Infrastructure Income Fund. The merger involves abrdn Japan Equity Fund, Inc. (NYSE: JEQ) and abrdn Global Infrastructure Income Fund (NYSE: ASGI), with the transaction expected to be concluded soon.
